  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Legacy Accounts"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="table" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="border" value="1"}]
        "\n  "
        element ns=html local="tbody" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="tr" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="th" attrs=[]
              "Account"
            element ns=html local="th" attrs=[]
              "Status\n  "
          element ns=html local="tr" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="td" attrs=[]
              "Northwind"
            element ns=html local="td" attrs=[]
              element ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
                "Active\n  stray text\n  "
          element ns=html local="tr" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="td" attrs=[]
              "Contoso"
            element ns=html local="td" attrs=[]
              "Pending\n"
      "\n"
